LUKAKU BREAKS UNITED SOCIAL MEDIA RECORD

Romelu Lukaku is yet to make a Manchester United appearance, yet our new arrival from Everton has already carved out a small piece of history by breaking a club social media record.

Saturday morning’s tweet that announced a transfer fee had been agreed with Everton is now @ManUtd’s most retweeted post of all time, with over 93,000 fans sharing it on Twitter.

The previous record was held by Lukaku’s friend Paul Pogba and the first official photo of him wearing the United kit following his return to Old Trafford last summer (with over 88K retweets).

Meanwhile, on the club’s Instagram account, the same Lukaku announcement (transfer fee agreed) is now also our second-most liked post of all time with over 869,000 likes. That is just behind the trophy-lift photo from the successful UEFA Europa League final in Stockholm, Sweden, back in May.

Man Utd Confirm Squad Numbers to Be Worn by New Signing Romelu Lukaku & Victor Lindelof
680
Jamie Spencer
14 JUL 2017
​Manchester United have ​officially confirmed the squad numbers that will be worn by new signings Romelu Lukaku and Victor Lindelof this season ahead of the club's first friendly of pre-season against MLS franchise LA Galaxy on Saturday night.

Lukaku will take the vacant number nine shirt after he previously told ESPN that he'd asked permission from ex-United striker Zlatan Ibrahimovic to have it - the Swede is currently doing his rehab back in Manchester and could sign a new short-term deal when fit.

Lukaku had worn the number 10 shirt at Everton and could have had it at United after Wayne Rooney's departure, but opted for a jersey more closely associated with strikers.

Lindelof will be wearing the number two shirt as had also been expected - he was pictured with the digit printed on his training kit at the start of the week.

The Swedish defender will become only the fourth player to wear number two for United since set squad numbers were introduced to the Premier League in 1993, following on from Paul Parker, Gary Neville and Rafael da Silva.

The club has not mentioned possible changes for existing squad members and it means that for the time being both the 7 and 10 shirts remain open, although changes can still be made until the Premier League squad number deadline in early August.

All other players have been pictured wearing their usual numbers on their training kit in California, bar Andreas Pereira. The Brazilian junior international has been seen with number 15 on his training gear after previously wearing number 41 before heading to Granada on loan.

Adnan Januzaj, who has now left United for Real Sociedad, was the last player registered to 15.

關於引援

我們還會繼續引援，我希望引進4名球員，目前只能説完成了一半的工作。我還需要兩名甚至更多的球員，至少一位，但是我不想説出名字來，因為這樣是不對的。

談馬迪、莫拉達

馬迪依然是一位車路士球員，我們也必須尊重俱樂部。很顯然，莫拉達我們很感興趣，但我們沒有和皇馬達成任何協議。

伊巴謙莫域是否可能再度簽約

有可能的，他並不高興以這種方式結束上賽季。我們依舊為他開放大門，當然，我們希望他能夠做出一個決定，但伊巴謙莫域最快也要12月才能恢復，所以，我們為什麼不耐心等待一個好結果呢。

14/07/2017 21:08, Report by Mark Froggatt in Los Angeles
MOURINHO: WHY I SIGNED LUKAKU FROM EVERTON

Manchester United boss Jose Mourinho has explained exactly why he signed Romelu Lukaku from Everton, and emphasised he has an excellent relationship with his former Chelsea player.

In a press conference to preview this weekend’s match against LA Galaxy in the US, the boss admitted a target man was always high on his list of priorities in the transfer market, before he declared Lukaku’s history of scoring goals in the Premier League made him the perfect addition.

“He was difficult to get,” Jose told reporters. “He is from the Premier League. Obviously there are other good strikers in football, but the Premier League is a very specific habitat. A difficult habitat for strikers and normally they need some time to adapt, but Lukaku has been in the Premier League for five seasons.

"Now he comes to a club with different responsibilities in the right moment of his career. He is still a young player but he has years of experience in the Premier League and the Belgian national team. He will go into the Champions League, which was also his main motivation.

“Romelu is not a player that participates a lot in the build-up play. He is a player that normally plays in the last third. We had so many opponents last season that decided clearly to defend, closing spaces, playing with lots of defenders and defensive midfield players.

"We needed a target man, which is not Martial or Rashford. We have good options, good players, but a target man, a clear number nine, one who is comfortable to play in the box, we thought that was Romelu.”

Mourinho briefly worked with Lukaku when he returned to Chelsea in the summer of 2012, before he later allowed Romelu to transfer to Everton. They are now back together at United and Jose says they have a very good relationship, however he did not play a part in the negotiation process.

“I did nothing,” he said. “I did not negotiate. It was Mr Woodward who negotiated with Romelu, his agent and the Everton board. Everything was done by Mr Woodward. The only thing I did was to call him when the situation was almost there, just to guarantee that he will be an important player in my team.

"It is quite a great experience, the fact that we worked together already for a few months, during the time where I was at Chelsea. At Man United, he was at Everton and our relationship was always very close, in spite of it not working very well for us together. The relationship is good, he is polite, we have always kept a good feeling and now we are back together in a different moment.

“I told him and Lindelof on the day we started that they are very lucky to belong to such a group, not because they don't deserve it from a professional point of view because they did very well at Everton and Benfica. But because the group is a really special group and it is amazing for a player to change club and feel that the group is fantastic. I feel they will be here for a long time."

關於新援們的表現，林加德説道：“是的，他們(盧卡古和林德洛夫)都適應得很好，這是支很容易融入的球隊，盧卡古和普巴很親密。”

“盧卡古進過很多球，我們知道他能做些什麼。如果他能把自己的得分能力帶到曼聯，這對球隊會是極大的幫助。他很強壯，身體條件非常出眾。我認為下賽季他會給後衞們製造很多麻煩，在訓練中我們已經見識過了。”

“盧卡古進過很多球，我們知道他能做些什麼。如果他能把自己的得分能力帶到曼聯，這對球隊會是極大的幫助。他很強壯，身體條件非常出眾。我認為下賽季他會給後衞們製造很多麻煩，在訓練中我們已經見識過了。”

上賽季曼聯斬獲了社區盾杯、聯賽盃、歐霸盃三座冠軍，他們將在明天迎來美國行的首個對手洛杉磯銀河隊。

哥斯達說道：“我當時被一些人影響了，他們私下里對主教練與隊醫的事不滿。我當時很生氣，認為他簡直就是一個壞蛋；如今我才知道他是一個多麼大度的人，壞人留在了這裡。”

“我離開是因為我發現自己做錯了，他們發現我不能對這件事有清楚的認識。跟我有一樣想法的人也踢不上球，只能選擇離開。”
“願他一切都好。”如今事件的主角都離開了故事的舞台，策劃事件的人擁有了那個舞台。在足球世界裡，這樣的事情必須要面對。

“我離開是因為我發現自己做錯了，他們發現我不能對這件事有清楚的認識。跟我有一樣想法的人也踢不上球，只能選擇離開。”
“願他一切都好。”如今事件的主角都離開了故事的舞台，策劃事件的人擁有了那個舞台。在足球世界裡，這樣的事情必須要面對。
